column2: As an user, I want to be able to access recipes
column3:
-Create recipe class
-Create ingredient class
-Set up UI to be read once created
column6: HIGH - Core part for the delivery of project.

column2: As an user, I want to be able to create new recipes that I can access
column3:
-Make UI changes to give user add button
-Implement the add recipe function
column6: HIGH - Core part of the functionality of the application.

column2: As an user, I want to be able to make changes to recipes by editing them
column3:
-Make UI changes so that recipes can be edited
-Implement the ability for users to edit a single recipe
column6: HIGH - Core part of the functionality of the application.

column2: As an user, I want to be able to delete recipes I do not like
column3:
-Add button in UI to delete the current recipe
-Add function to manage multiple recipes to delete multiple at once for ease of use (OPTIONAL)
-Implement the delete recipe function
column6: HIGH - Core part of the functionality of the application.

column2: As an user, I want to be able to find a recipe inside a long list.
column3:
-Add search bar to UI
-Implement search function
column6: MEDIUM - As the website is still in its beginnings, looking through a small list of recipes makes search less needed immediately.

column2: As an user, I want to look for specific aspects of a recipe to choose one
column3:
-Add UI filters to search
-Implement filter functions for searching
column6: LOW - As long as the search feature works, filtering can be revisited

column2: As a new user, I can register an account and log in securely so I can access the platform.
column3:
-Design registration UI (email, password)
-Create login form UI with proper form validation
 -Implement password validation rules
- Create backend endpoint for user registration
 -Add error handling (invalid login, duplicate account, weak password)
column6: HIGH - Core entry point; failure blocks all other features. Security vulnerabilities if passwords not properly encrypted.

column2: As a user, I can access the dashboard where I can manage my profile with dietary preferences and allergies so recommendations and planning reflect my needs. (Not Functional yet only frontend)
column3:
- Design form for dietary preferences (front end only)
 -Design form for allergy information (front end only)
 -Create function to retrieve and display user profile information
column6: MEDIUM - Incorrect allergy data affects personalization and user trust; could pose health risks.

column2: As a user, I have a user-friendly interface with navigation to key features.
column3:
-Sketch wireframe or prototype of homepage layout
 -Create home page with basic initial design including headers and navigation menus
-Add navigation buttons to dashboard
- Implement responsive design for mobile and desktop
-Create UI for profile management page
column6: LOW - Can be easily revised and adjusted later based on user feedback.
